policy: Stage-local PASS requires deterministic synthetic boundaries and explicit CONTROLLED_NOT_RUN status for every production or protected assertion; none can enable RAW, recovery, M3, Trash or publication.

resolutions.finding: Gmail messages.list returns message references rather than candidate classification facts and may paginate each mailbox scope.
resolutions.resolution: The discoverer pages fixed message-level scopes with includeSpamTrash=true, deduplicates opaque IDs, fetches only allowlisted metadata headers and audits filters read-only.

resolutions.finding: Gmail History IDs are non-contiguous and an old watermark can expire or return 404.
resolutions.resolution: The reconciler treats the watermark as opaque, advances only after complete pagination and deterministically falls back to full reconciliation for initial, Sunday, expired, 404, difference and manual modes.

resolutions.finding: No authoritative protected owner evidence for exact production Moomoo AU sender identities is available in this run.
resolutions.resolution: The committed production registry is versioned but empty, all real candidates remain UNKNOWN, and only synthetic evidence-backed entries are used in tests.

resolutions.finding: Real mailbox coverage, candidate parity and Gmail RAW byte parity require protected Gmail authority and private message data.
resolutions.resolution: Injected synthetic transports prove local algorithms only; real Gmail calls, full reads and mutations remain zero and linked final acceptances are not PASS.

resolutions.finding: Attachment MIME labels and filenames are untrusted and parsing can create execution, traversal or resource-exhaustion risk.
resolutions.resolution: Classification uses bounded in-memory magic and container inspection, rejects active/polyglot/macro/formula/path/bomb inputs, never extracts paths, executes code, invokes a model or accesses a network.

resolutions.finding: Private-first Raw commit and remote recovery require protected GitHub credentials and the unique private repository.
resolutions.resolution: The production-capable adapter remains uncalled; local append-only storage and the pre-network guard prove encryption/order/idempotency only, with recovery, public evidence, M3 and Trash all false.

resolutions.finding: AC-023 requires a deployed production schedule and compensation behavior, which belongs to Stage 5 and later observation.
resolutions.resolution: Stage 3 proves only Australia/Sydney Sunday/full-reconcile decision logic and makes no exact-start or deployed-schedule claim.

resolutions.finding: The no-Secret Stage 3 CI definition cannot execute remotely because intermediate uploads are prohibited.
resolutions.resolution: Local equivalent gates are required for this run; remote CI remains NOT_RUN until the single final publication.
